design_philosophy.description: A sophisticated blend of Swiss minimalist precision and the tactile warmth of classical publishing. The UI should feel like a high-end workspace for authors—clean, distraction-free, and typographically rich.
core_principles: Content First: The writing interface is sacred. Minimize UI chrome when typing.
Tactile Realism: Use subtle paper textures or warm off-whites instead of sterile clinical white.
Typography as UI: Use font weights and sizes to denote hierarchy instead of colored badges.
Sharp & Soft: Mix sharp rectangular containers (representing pages) with soft shadow lifts.

typography.loading_instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts: Fraunces (weights: 300..700), Manrope (weights: 400..700), Crimson Pro (weights: 400..700). Add to index.css or layout.

usage_rules: Use 'background' (#fcfbf9) for the main app canvas to simulate paper.
Use 'card' (white) for content containers to lift them off the canvas.
Use 'accent' (Terracotta) sparingly for primary actions (e.g., 'Generate Book', 'Save').
Use 'primary' (Deep Navy) for text and structural borders.
Avoid pure black (#000000). Use the dark charcoal 'foreground'.

dashboard.card_style: aspect-[2/3] bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 group relative overflow-hidden rounded-sm

editor.sidebar_left: w-64 border-r border-border bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm hidden md:flex flex-col z-10
editor.sidebar_right: w-72 border-l border-border bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm hidden lg:flex flex-col z-10
editor.main_area: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-8 md:p-12 relative flex justify-center
editor.paper_sheet: w-full max-w-3xl min-h-[1100px] bg-white shadow-sm border border-border/40 p-12 mx-auto my-4 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-white border-input focus:border-ring focus:ring-1 focus:ring-ring/20 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition-colors

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a very subtle SVG noise overlay on the body background at 2% opacity to give a paper feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-border. Use 'divide-y' and 'divide-x' utilities for lists.

image_urls.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) to match the elegant theme.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA. The 'muted-foreground' must be dark enough on the off-white background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring required on all interactive elements. Use 'ring-offset-2' for clear separation.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.hover_effects: Subtle lift (translate-y-[-2px]) and shadow increase for clickable cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Add '@fontsource/fraunces', '@fontsource/manrope', '@fontsource/crimson-pro' if using npm/yarn, or add Google Fonts links to index.html.
LANGUAGE: The UI MUST be in Italian ('Nuovo Libro', 'Capitoli', 'Impostazioni', etc.).
THEME SETUP: Update 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css' with the HSL values provided in the 'colors' section.
SHADCN CUSTOMIZATION: Override default 'radius' to '0.3rem' in tailwind config.
EDITOR LOGIC: Implement the 'Book Editor' as the core feature. It needs a sidebar for chapters and a main content editable area.
PDF GENERATION: Use 'html2pdf.js' or 'jspdf' for client-side generation, ensuring the output respects the KDP trim sizes (6x9, etc.).
STATE MANAGEMENT: Use Context API or Zustand to manage the 'Book Project' state (chapters, metadata, styles) globally.
NO AUTH: Implement a simple 'Local Project Manager' that saves work to localStorage/IndexedDB. No login screen needed.
AI INTEGRATION: Create a service layer for OpenAI calls. Mock the response if API key is missing.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
